## Description

Briefly explain what this Pull Request changes and why. Link any related issue.

## How this was tested

Describe how you verified the change. For example: ran `npm run dev` inside ldr/web and checked the affected screen, ran `npm run build` to confirm the TypeScript build passes, or added and ran tests.

## Checklist

1. [ ] This Pull Request targets main and my branch is up to date with main.
2. [ ] The build passes (`npm run build` inside ldr/web).
3. [ ] No secrets or real .env values are committed (only placeholders belong in version control).
4. [ ] The change is documented where needed, including CONTRIBUTING.md if the setup changed.
5. [ ] At least one reviewer has been requested.
